resources.string: This simple application allows you to choose a web browser from the installed ones when opening links - something that was made impossible in recent Android versions.

If you want to be able to choose a browser when opening links - make this applications your default browser. Then next time you click on links in non-browser applications, you\'ll see the similar picker.
This app does not track your interactions, doesn\'t send any information to any third-parties (doesn\'t even use internet permission). On top of that the full source code is available online.
